changes: Add an independent SIRK lifecycle manager owned by the Portal
Add stable, beta and dev channels mapped to main, beta and develop
Add backup, staged update, restore, rollback history and health checks
Run atomic file replacement in a detached helper after host shutdown
Make develop the mandatory working branch
Apply the global Portal radius in the final loaded stylesheet
Remove the legacy Management-only surface override
Clip Automation, Approval and all module renderers to the shared 10px host
Fix Portal settings self-conflict detection
Keep the admin save button usable with long status messages
Add Portal settings save regression coverage
Complete standalone Portal asset manifest
Fix Settings and module runtime URLs
Normalize disabled module states
Fix standalone Portal plugin pin
Serve Portal UI contract stylesheet with CSS MIME type
Change the MeshCentral technical plugin identifier to JavaScript-safe SIRKPortal
Add SIRKPortal.js and SIRKPortalAdmin.js canonical entrypoints
Remove hyphenated entrypoints that broke pluginHandler.prepExports and caused a blank UI
Update the installer to use meshcentral-data/plugins/SIRKPortal
Add regression validation for JavaScript-safe shortName values
Add an admin entrypoint delegating to admin.js
Superseded by 1.5.144 because the hyphenated plugin identifier was not JavaScript-safe
Publish the finalized SIRK-Portal repository layout to main
Include the unified UI contract for Overview, Devices and all module views
Synchronize release metadata and documentation for installation testing
Extend the canonical Portal UI contract to Overview and Devices
Apply shared mc-portal classes to surfaces, cards, controls, statuses, badges and device lists
Keep only device-specific geometry while sharing the visual system
Add regression coverage for the unified Portal view contract
Rename repository metadata and canonical URLs to Eris92/SIRK-Portal
Remove MyCompany compatibility and migration documentation
Align documentation with the final server, public and admin layout
Add hierarchical repository indexes for selective context loading
Update agent rules and startup prompt for index-first repository reading
Reset the test-phase version history to the canonical SIRK Management Platform baseline
